Actuators.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent to the actuator(s).
Actuators.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent to the actuator(s).

float64[] position		# Position of the actuators in [rad] for angular actuators
						# and [m] for linear actuators.

float64[] velocity		# Velocities of the actuators in [rad/s] for angular actuators
						# and [m/s] for linear actuators.

float64[] normalized	# Everything that does not fit the above,
						# normalized between [-1 ... 1].

fields.name: position
fields.comment: Position of the actuators in [rad] for angular actuators

fields.name: velocity
fields.comment: Velocities of the actuators in [rad/s] for angular actuators

fields.name: normalized
fields.comment: Everything that does not fit the above,

ActuatorsAngularPosition.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsAngularPosition.raw:
# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for angular position.

float64[] position		# Position of the actuators in [rad]

ActuatorsAngularVelocity.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsAngularVelocity.raw:
# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for angular velocity.

float64[] velocity		# Velocity of the actuators in [rad/s]

ActuatorsLinearPosition.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsLinearPosition.raw:
# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for linear position.

float64[] position		# Position of the actuators in [m]

ActuatorsLinearVelocity.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsLinearVelocity.raw:
# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for linear velocity.

float64[] velocity		# Velocity of the actuators in [m/s]

ActuatorsNormalized.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsNormalized.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for normalized outputs.

float64[] normalized	# Normalized between [-1 ... 1].

ActuatorsPosition.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsPosition.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
# to the actuator(s) for position.

ActuatorsAngularPosition angular	# Position of the actuators in [rad]

ActuatorsLinearPosition linear		# Position of the actuators in [m]

ActuatorsVelocity.description: This message defines lowest level commands to be sent
ActuatorsVelocity.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# This message defines lowest level commands to be sent

ActuatorsAngularVelocity angular	# Velocity of the actuators in [rad/s]

ActuatorsLinearVelocity linear		# Velocity of the actuators in [m/s]
